generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mother and a taxpayer, I've always believed in strong national security. But have you considered how over-reliance on foreign tech for our defense systems could backfire? Just last year, a trusted ally's supply chain was compromised, delaying critical updates to their air defense systems. We can't afford to let that happen here. Supporting strategic autonomy isn't about isolation—it's about ensuring our families and communities are truly protected. #NationalSecurityFirst #MadeInOurCountry
